hero.desc: Agen perjalanan terpercaya untuk tour, snorkeling, dan lainnya.

home.featuredDesc: Explore handpicked destinations for your next adventure
home.helpImprove: Help us improve by leaving a review!
home.aboutBody: CIDIKA TRAVEL&TOUR focuses on memorable Nusa Penida experiences: land tours, snorkeling, and stay packages. We combine comfort, hospitality, and professionalism. Booking is easy via email, Instagram, WhatsApp, or phone.
home.point1: Complete packages: One Day, Half Day, 1D1N + Snorkeling, and 2D1N.
home.point2: Experienced local guides who can also help with photos.
home.point3: Private tours with flexible schedules, no mixed groups.
home.point4: Clear pricing including round-trip fast boat and entrance tickets.
home.banner1: Iconic spots like Kelingking, Diamond, and Crystal Bay in one journey.
home.whySubtitle: Advantages that make your trip more relaxed.

whyItems.title: Licensed & Experienced Operator
whyItems.text: Our local team knows the best spots and timing.

whyItems.title: Perfect for Everyone
whyItems.text: Great for solo travelers, couples, families, and company groups.

whyItems.title: Flexible Schedule
whyItems.text: Available for private charter or open trip.

whyItems.title: Optimized Itinerary
whyItems.text: Efficient without missing the best moments.

home.howSubtitle: Simple and fast, no login required.

home.ctaTitle: Ready for an adventure in Nusa Penida?

dest.title: Destinations
dest.heroDesc: Discover the hidden gems of Indonesia
dest.penidaDesc: An island with iconic cliffs and beaches in Southeast Bali, famous for Kelingking Beach and Broken Beach.
dest.lembonganDesc: A small island with white-sand beaches, perfect for snorkeling and visiting Devil's Tears.
dest.ceninganDesc: The smallest island with Blue Lagoon and a peaceful atmosphere, ideal for a relaxed adventure.
dest.empty: No destinations found for your search.
